---
title: "14_bTF_regression_primary"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
---

# Setup

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
data <- readRDS(here('data','processed','drivers_telins.rds'))

data <- data %>% filter(tumor_tf_rate<50, tel_ins_norm<7500)
```

```{r preliminary}
plot(log1p(data$tumor_tf_rate), log1p(data$blood_tf_rate))
cor.test(data$tumor_tf_rate, data$blood_tf_rate, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(data$tumor_tf_rate, data$blood_tf_rate, method = 'kendall')

```
